exercises.hindiScript: तुम मुझे कॉल कर सकते थे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He could have told the truth.
He could have read this book.
He could have done this work easily.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We could have made it better.
We could have arrived on time.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I could have taken that job.
She could have taken this opportunity.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You could have avoided this mistake.

exercises.audioScript: He could have read this book.
exercises.hindiScript: वह यह किताब पढ़ सकता था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You could not have taken this decision.
He could have read this book.
exercises.answer: He could have read this book.

exercises.hindiScript: हम ज्यादा मेहनत कर सकते थे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I could have done this earlier.

exercises.audioScript: I could have taken that job.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं वह नौकरी ले सकता था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He could have told the truth.
I could have taken that job.
exercises.answer: I could have taken that job.

dictationPassage.text: You could have called me. She could have saved money. I could have gone there. They could have stopped it. You could have come earlier.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: तुम मुझे कॉल कर सकते थे। वह पैसे बचा सकती थी। मैं वहाँ जा सकता था। वे इसे रोक सकते थे। तुम पहले आ सकते थे।
